feed.title: Eurovision Toolkit — Blog
feed.subtitle: Guides, explainers and party tips for Eurovision 2026.

entry.title: How Does Eurovision Voting Actually Work? (2026 Guide)
entry.summary: A plain-English guide to Eurovision voting in 2026: jury vs televote, the 1–8/10/12 points ladder, the Big Five skip, and the new Rest of the World online vote.

entry.title: The Complete Eurovision Points System — Explained Simply
entry.summary: Where the 12 points come from, why juries and televotes are weighted 50/50, how the spokesperson roll-call works, tie-break rules and the math behind the "nul points" curse.

entry.title: The Official Eurovision Drinking Game & Bingo Party Guide (2026)
entry.summary: Rules, printable 5×5 bingo card, 30 classic Eurovision tropes, pan-European snack board, full evening timeline and no-alcohol alternatives.
